action.reasoning: Observation: 4-model ensemble with cnxt5 got 0.7974, worse than 3-model 0.7998. Adding more ConvNeXt models doesn't help. Analysis: I should revert to top-3 ensemble. With 10 iterations and 4.37h left, I have budget for ~3-4 more training runs. Need to either improve individual models or add a truly diverse model. Let me revert predict.py to only include cnxt2.pt and cnxt3.pt (the 0.7998 config) to lock in the best score. Decision: Update predict.py to match iter 16 config (best.pt + cnxt2 + cnxt3 only) and submit eval to confirm 0.7998.
